text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So cooool! Races are just so full of passion!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I hope you and I can bring out that passion 
in our races, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaah! I'm gonna GIVE! IT! MY! AAAALL!!
